w2:udc_fromToCalendar.style: <xf:select1 allOption="false" appearance="minimal" chooseOption="false" class="" direction="auto" disabled="false" disabledClass="w2selectbox_disabled" id="lc_selectbox2" style="width: 100px;" submenuSize="fixed"></xf:select1>

w2:textbox.label: 수금조건/계약서 수정은 "수정"버튼 후 행추가하여 등록하셔야 합니다.
